title: Elaphoglossum sprucei
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum sprucei is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family of ferns is commonly known as the wood fern family. Elaphoglossum sprucei is further classified within the genus Elaphoglossum, which comprises over 1,000 species of ferns. The classification of Elaphoglossum sprucei is also reflected in its binomial nomenclature, where sprucei refers to its type location. This classification helps scientists to identify and distinguish Elaphoglossum sprucei from other similar species.

intro: Elaphoglossum sprucei, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Research has found that Elaphoglossum sprucei possesses potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may be useful in treating various health conditions.
